title: 2 Bunches Peony Artificial Flowers, 10 PCS Silk Single Stem Peony Fake Flowers Realistic Bouquet for Wedding Home Party Table Centerpieces Floral Arrangement Hotel Office Decor, Cream White
features: Size: 1 pack contains 2 bunches of peony artificial flowers, each with 5 peonies( vase is NOT included). The total length of the artificial flowers is 12.6 inches/32cm and the diameter of each flowering peony head is approximately 3.94 inches/10cm. You can put them in a vase as a bouquet or sepreate them to single stems.

High quality: Artificial peonies are made from high quality silk and durable plastic stems (with wire inside to hold their shape) with vivid green leaves. Odourless, non-fading and with evenly coloured flowers that look like real natural flowers.

Easy to use: Single stem peonies are very popular in flower arrangements. These stems are thick, but pliable and you can easily cut or bend them to suit your needs. The realistic peony bouquet can be combined with a number of other artificial plants to make your own style of DIY arrangement.

Care-free: Realistic peonies look like real natural flowers without the need for watering or care. Artificial peonies are a practical alternative to real flowers, remaining fresh and beautiful year after year. If people are allergic to flowers, artificial flowers are the best choice.

Endless decoration: Artificial peonies will always be as beautiful as the day you receive them. These lifelike peonies are perfect for bridal bouquets, wedding bouquets, cake decoration, table centrepieces, wedding backdrops and more as decorations. Also a perfect gift choice for Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, holidays, parties and more.
